## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan a comprehensive SEO strategy for Innerwell's website, focusing on technical improvements and content expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Three-phase SEO strategy: 1) Low-hanging fruit & technical fixes, 2) Foundation building, 3) Scaling for growth](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Expand city-level pages from 100 to 250 for broader coverage](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Implement technical SEO fixes, including sitemap updates and H1 tag corrections](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Develop a structured content strategy for conditions and provider pages](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Create a detailed timeline and metrics for measuring success and ROI](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)

## Topics

### Technical SEO Improvements

  - [Update sitemap to include all pages (currently only \~200 pages indexed)](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Fix duplicate H1 tags, particularly the "Log into my account" issue](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Address duplicate pages and improve blog post accessibility](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [Incorporate SEO keywords into H2 and H3 tags](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Switch client-side JavaScript rendering to server-side for better crawlability](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Resolve potential cloaking issues on the ketamine page](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)

### Content Strategy and Expansion

  - [Increase city-level pages from 100 to 250 for broader coverage](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Implement CCRR strategy: Cut, Consolidate, Refresh, and Refactor content](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Introduce new category structure focusing on conditions and cities](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Remove "blog" from URLs for medical/informational pages](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Unify and enrich clinician and provider pages](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Launch redesigned layout for condition pages with comprehensive topic coverage](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)

### Provider Data and Page Generation

  - [Utilize existing structured data on providers (treatment methods, areas of focus, services, insurance, gender)](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Develop a strategy for generating provider pages based on multiple attributes (city, specialty, insurance, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [Implement schema markup for provider pages (local business schema)](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
  - [Create a system to handle scenarios with few or no providers for specific attribute combinations](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)

### Navigation and User Experience

  - [Update website navigation to reflect new content structure and priorities](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Implement cross-pollination between products (e.g., showing relevant providers on condition pages)](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [Develop quizzes or tests for conditions to improve user engagement and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)

### Metrics and Timeline

  - [Create a detailed content forecast and prioritize condition categories (starting with anxiety and depression)](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2102.0)
  - [Develop input metrics (e.g., articles published per week/month) and output metrics (traffic growth, customer acquisition cost)](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)
  - [Set goals for reducing customer acquisition cost to $200-$300 range](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1961.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dave to provide more detailed, actionable recommendations for technical SEO fixes by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2331.0)
  - [Create a detailed timeline for implementing the three-phase strategy](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)
  - [GrowthX team to start discussions on category structure and approach](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2385.0)
  - [Innerwell to share provider data structure and fields with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Innerwell to provide prioritized list of conditions to focus on, including upcoming pain management program](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting between Dave and Philip to address any remaining technical questions](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2237.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop content forecast and success metrics based on Innerwell's revenue and conversion rate data](https://fathom.video/share/J8T_yWRfzdbTvsSTMKDLTWKm2J84VD1G?tab=summary&timestamp=2009.0)
